posts.author: Traceyr (Tracey Robins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there, has anyone successfully integrated pageproof and monday together and able to send proofs to clients without leaving Monday.com?
I would like to be able to send proofs straight from there rather than leaving the app and going somewhere else
Thank you!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Tracey,

Incase you weren’t aware, we do have a dedicated Pageproof App available in our apps Marketplace.
